OUR SERVICES

Our Healthcare Solutions

Comprehensive medical services designed to give you the best care, wherever you are in the world.

Medical Second Opinion

Get expert medical opinions from leading specialists worldwide. Ensure you're making the right treatment decisions with confidence.

Learn More →

Medical Tourism

Access world-class medical treatments at affordable prices. We handle everything from consultation to travel arrangements.

Learn More →

Skilled Nursing Care

Professional nursing care and rehabilitation services for post-surgery recovery and long-term health management.

Learn More →

How Helio Works

Your journey to better healthcare in three simple steps

1

Submit Your Details

Share your medical information and health concerns with our secure platform.

2

Get Expert Advice

Receive personalized recommendations from our network of medical professionals.

3

Receive Care

Access treatment, travel support, or nursing care based on your specific needs.

See Full Process →
GLOBAL EXCHANGE

Leading the Future of Global Healthcare

Helio was recently recognized for its contributions at Dr. Prem’s Masterclass: Medical Tourism & Wellness Global Exchange. This prestigious event brought together top-tier healthcare professionals, international buyers, and industry pioneers from across the globe.

Honored with Excellence Award

Recognized for excellence in connecting patients with top-tier global medical networks, facilitating seamless medical tourism, and providing trusted second opinions.

Learn About Our Network

What Our Patients Say

Real stories from patients who found hope and healing through Helio

Sarah Johnson
Canada • Cardiac Surgery
★★★★★

"Helio helped me get a second opinion that changed my treatment plan completely. The doctors were thorough and the process was seamless. I'm grateful for their expertise."

Michael Chen
Australia • Orthopedic Surgery
★★★★★

"I needed surgery but couldn't afford it locally. Helio arranged everything for my medical tourism trip to India. The quality of care was excellent and I saved thousands."

Priya Patel
UK • Nursing Care
★★★★★

"After my father's stroke, we needed skilled nursing care at home. Helio's team provided compassionate, professional care that helped him recover faster."

James Rodriguez
USA • Oncology Consultation
★★★★★

"The peace of mind I got from Helio's second opinion service was invaluable. They connected me with specialists I never would have found on my own."
